lead.headline: Two live GTM sessions demand your attention before noon.
lead.deck: You're back-to-back with Building your GTM from scratch at 9:30am and Early-stage sales skills at 11:00am—both online with BGV partners. These are the foundational skills sessions you need to lock in before the day fragments.
